item.title: Indigo brings the open social web to one app
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Indigo's new social app lets you cross-post to the open social web, including Mastodon and Bluesky, and browse a unified timeline.

item.title: U.S. bank disclose security lapse after sharing customer data with AI app
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: The bank said the security lapse was due to the use of an “unauthorized” AI software app.

item.title: Threads tests a Meta AI integration that works similarly to Grok
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The feature is designed to help people get real-time context about trends and breaking stories, as well as receive recommendations, all within conversations.

item.title: Exaforce raises $125M Series B to build AI for catching and stopping cyberattacks as they happen
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: As bad actors weaponize AI to exploit software vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed, companies are increasingly recognizing the need to bolster their cybersecurity defenses. The round valued the three-year-old startup at $725 million.

item.title: Waymo issues recall to deal with a flooding problem
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Waymo has issued a software recall that makes its robotaxis more cautious around flooded areas. A "final remedy" is in the works.

item.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

item.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

item.title: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: TikTok is systematically converting its discovery engine into a transaction layer, which both deepens user retention and opens entirely new revenue streams for its new owners.

item.title: AI is turning connected cars into pothole-finding machines
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

item.title: Spotify’s launches a Wrapped-style recap of your entire listening history
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Spotify's new feature will show you the number of unique songs that you listened to until now

item.title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

item.title: Amazon launches 30-minute delivery across the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Amazon says its new ultra-fast delivery option brings groceries, household essentials, and other items to customers’ doors in 30 minutes.

item.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
item.dc:creator: Connie Loizos
item.description: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input and generates a response at the same time, so it's more like a phone call than a text chain.

item.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

item.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

item.title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.

item.title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

item.title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that it is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

item.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

item.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.
